issue.title: Design question: EU AI Act Article 12 specific surface, audit substrate verifier independence, retention + deletion proof handling

deliverables.purpose: Defines Article 12 aligned evidence profile without claiming legal compliance.
Defines OSS deterministic verifier and versioned schemas as the trust root instead of a hosted API.
Adopts commit-then-redact retention evidence profile while preserving append-only chain integrity.
Plans how to include post-v0.0.3-alpha fixes in a future alpha without moving the frozen tag.
Links the new AIA-12 profile and verifier independence documents from the governance and legal document table.
Updates issue #7 status language from open design question to resolved-by-docs stance.
